creator: igor.polovykh@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Gordon Tetlow from comment #7)

/usr/src ] # usr.sbin/unbound/
[ /usr/src/usr.sbin/unbound ] # make
===> daemon (all)
rm -f .depend
echo local-unbound.full: /usr/lib/libc.a /usr/lib/libprivateunbound.a /usr/lib/libutil.a /usr/lib/libssl.a /usr/lib/libcrypto.a /usr/lib/libpthread.a >> .depend
clang  -O2 -pipe -I/usr/src/contrib/unbound -I/usr/src/contrib/ldns   -g -MD  -MF.depend.acl_list.o -MTacl_list.o -std=gnu99 -fstack-protector-strong -Wsystem-headers -Wall -Wno-format-y2k -W -Wno-unused-parameter -Wstrict-prototypes -Wmissing-prototypes -Wpointer-arith -Wreturn-type -Wcast-qual -Wwrite-strings -Wswitch -Wshadow -Wunused-parameter -Wcast-align -Wchar-subscripts -Winline -Wnested-externs -Wredundant-decls -Wold-style-definition -Wno-pointer-sign -Wmissing-variable-declarations -Wno-empty-body -Wno-string-plus-int -Wno-unused-const-variable  -Qunused-arguments  -c /usr/src/contrib/unbound/daemon/acl_list.c -o acl_list.o
/usr/src/contrib/unbound/daemon/acl_list.c:42:10: fatal error: 'config.h' file not found
#include "config.h"
         ^~~~~~~~~~
1 error generated.
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make[1]: stopped in /usr/src/usr.sbin/unbound/daemon
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/src/usr.sbin/unbound
